itemDisplayName: Deploy an Ubuntu LTS VM (22.04 / 24.04 / 26.04) with Trusted Launch
description: Deploys an Ubuntu LTS Gen2 virtual machine with Trusted Launch (Secure Boot + vTPM), Standard public IP, SSH key or password authentication, and configurable VM size. Supports Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, 24.04 LTS, and 26.04 LTS.
summary: Ubuntu LTS VM (choose 22.04, 24.04 or 26.04) with Trusted Launch, Standard IP, and SSH key auth.
